repo_prior_art.cite: none; API panel catalogues contain linear/FWL history-cell results, not PPML

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT, eq. (3.4), eq. (30), and Appendix B1 derive the identical two-unit/three-period PPML formula; White1982MisspecifiedML supplies the generic pseudo-true score apparatus.

MoreauKastler2025PTT explicitly identifies the same PPML wrong-comparison mechanism and its eq. (30) makes the displayed two-unit derivative and positive-effect sign reversal a direct differentiation; deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020TWFE is the linear benchmark.
MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.3) and Appendix B1 eq. (.1) already define PTT as the counterfactual-outcome-share weighted average of exp(delta_it)-1.

Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD Section 3 derives fixed-T nonlinear staggered imputation/pooled-QMLE equivalence and delta-method or analytic standard errors; it is a closer inference comparator than the stated BJS-only comparison, though not an analytic influence function for this exact PTT ratio.

structure_flags.label: Theorem 2
structure_flags.one_line: The proposed novelty-bearing kernel is an unproved theorem rather than a conjecture or the open-ended inference question; relabel the headline claim as a conjecture.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: MoreauKastler2025PTT already derives the claimed 2x3 PPML formula and general FOCs; packaging them with generic QMLE/FWL notation is not a field-level strict tightening.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 3
novelty_flags.one_line: MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.3) and Appendix B1 eq. (.1) already give the positive counterfactual-share PTT aggregation.

novelty_flags.label: Seed 1 / Theorem 1 comparison
novelty_flags.one_line: The seed's strict-delta claim that the exact 2x3 formula is absent from MoreauKastler2025PTT is false: its eq. (30) is the same formula after substituting the exponential untreated means.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD Section 3 is a closer omitted inference comparator: it treats fixed-T nonlinear staggered imputation, pooled Poisson QMLE equivalence, and analytic/delta-method standard errors.

novelty_flags.label: Proposal-level tier
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=letter below novelty_target=field; replace the imported 2x3 algebra with a genuinely new, computable multi-cohort PPML sign/equality frontier or a valid new PTT-ratio inference theorem against Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 3 and estimand_functional
soundness_flags.one_line: E_N is defined as a finite-panel average of realized arrays, so E_N[D_it Y_it]/E_N[D_it b_it] is random and is not the population PTT functional; use E_N[D_it nu_it] or an explicitly stated outer expectation and make the same convention in omega_gt.

soundness_flags.label: ass:full-rank-fe-design
soundness_flags.one_line: The condition E_N[Z_it Z_it'] positive definite is an unweighted design-rank condition, not the PPML information-matrix nonsingularity named and attributed to White1982MisspecifiedML; state the weighted Hessian condition or rename the assumption.

soundness_flags.label: ass:no-anticipation / Theorem 3
soundness_flags.one_line: No-anticipation concerns t<g, whereas every cell in C has t>=g; it plays no role in the displayed PTT identity and should be removed from this theorem's dependencies.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the already-published 2x3 formula with a conjectured computable multi-cohort frontier: specify the observable input, an algorithm for the PPML projection/sign regions, and a nondegenerate class on which it strictly separates pooled PPML from PTT.
Redefine PTT entirely as a population-law functional using nu_it and b_it, then prove the T=2 ratio-of-ratios reduction under that same convention before retaining it as the corrected target.

Recast the inference question around Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD's pooled cohort-dummy Poisson QMLE, state fixed-T cohort-share and denominator conditions, and seek the explicit delta-method influence function for the PTT ratio rather than an unspecified unit-FE profile.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision: repair the population functional and re-anchor the inference comparison, then pivot the headline away from Moreau-Kastler's already-derived 2x3 PPML formula toward a demonstrably new multi-cohort frontier or inference result.
